prompt: Create a vertical 3:4 high-key creamy soft-haze studio portrait of a young woman in a strapless white draped dress, photographed from chest up against a warm beige seamless backdrop. She has dark brown hair parted in the center and tied into a low, neat updo, with a small pearl earring visible. Her face is deliberately hidden by a centered opaque square privacy block in a soft beige skin-tone gradient, covering the entire facial area from forehead to chin. Use low contrast, overexposed milky highlights, feathered edges, and a translucent white veil or gauze foreground drifting along the right side and partially across the lower face and chest, as if shooting through white mist. Include exactly 2 visible pink orchid flowers: one larger orchid held delicately at the center of her chest by her hand, and one pink orchid tucked behind her left ear. Add a slim white orchid stem rising beside her neck. Her pose is gentle and editorial, shoulders bare, one hand holding the flower, with a delicate bracelet on the wrist. Lighting should feel like a white orchid soft-fog studio photoshoot: bright diffused key light from upper right, slight highlight bloom, creamy beige shadows, no harsh outlines. Add small white uppercase text NUYOAH VISION at the top left, and spaced white uppercase text SOFT HAZE STUDY centered near the bottom. Minimal fashion editorial composition, elegant, airy, romantic, realistic photography, no extra objects, no watermark beyond the specified text.
